title: Isaac Totem
description: The Totem of Undying is replaced by the character Isaac and the game The Binding of Isaac
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/541154ef4953e937926f729782514c8ce3e710f6.png)
![Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9febdadbb73e8fe6f0815fff80e073c301035f9.png)
**This texture pack replaces the Totem of Undying with Isaac from The Binding of Isaac. When the totem is triggered, it plays the sound of Isaac's mom screaming "_ISAAAAC!_" If you are a fan of the game, you will definitely enjoy this pack. Have fun!**
### IMPORTANT
- ### **Is there a port on the Bedrock Edition?**
  This texture pack is designed exclusively for Java Edition. We do not plan to release a version for Bedrock Edition.
- ### **Want to use it on Bedrock Edition?** 
  You can port the texture pack yourself, as long as you comply with all license terms.
- ### **Pack version warning ?**
   There is a high chance that resource packs will work with different versions of Minecraft without the need to change the version of the pack, unless there is a major update that breaks resource packs.

![Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9febdadbb73e8fe6f0815fff80e073c301035f9.png)
